calendar_label.en: Old church calendar — Jerusalem Patriarchate usage

fast.en: Wednesday or Friday fast — Strict fast

fast_detail.en: This is the regular weekly Orthodox fast unless a documented relaxation or local dispensation applies. Avoid meat, dairy, eggs, fish, oil, and wine.

title.en: Wednesday or Friday fast — Strict fast

detail.en: This is the regular weekly Orthodox fast unless a documented relaxation or local dispensation applies. Avoid meat, dairy, eggs, fish, oil, and wine.

note.en: Conservative automatic baseline; a documented override may apply a local dispensation or a special feast rank.

allowed_summary.en: Permitted: plant foods that do not contain the restricted categories

forbidden_summary.en: Not permitted: Meat and poultry, Dairy, Eggs, Fish, Wine, and Oil

duration.en: This is the food-fasting rule for the displayed church day. The source does not provide separate start and end hours, so the app does not guess a time.

beginner_explanation.en: The fasting type describes the day’s general food rule; it is not a judgment on a person’s faith or health.

spiritual_note.en: Fasting is also joined to prayer, repentance, mercy, and self-control; it is not only about food.

health_note.en: Health note: do not stop medicine or change treatment because of the app. Children, pregnant people, the ill, older adults, and those doing strenuous work may need an arrangement appropriate to their health.

end_condition.en: The source does not document a separate total-abstinence interval for this day.

detail.en: When a documented total-abstinence fast exists, the app shows its start, end, or ending condition exactly as sourced. Otherwise it does not invent hours.

feast.en: Today’s commemoration according to the old church calendar

source_note.en: Discovery data is temporary; a file becomes publishable only after the official-source gate and protected signing.

translation_notice.en: Scripture and liturgical texts come from independent native sources for each language, without machine translation or cross-language fallback.

fallback_trace.reason: مصدر orthodox_jordan يحتوي نصًا تجريبيًا/محجوزًا: lorem ipsum
لا يوجد عيد ثابت مثبت لليوم اليولياني 07-11.
لا يمكن إثبات توافق التاريخ المدني الأنطاكي مع اليوم اليولياني لتقويم القدس آليًا.

source_evidence.reason: مصدر orthodox_jordan يحتوي نصًا تجريبيًا/محجوزًا: lorem ipsum
لا يوجد عيد ثابت مثبت لليوم اليولياني 07-11.
لا يمكن إثبات توافق التاريخ المدني الأنطاكي مع اليوم اليولياني لتقويم القدس آليًا.
أعيد استخدام رصد DCS الرسمي المؤرخ والمحدود الذي جمعه مركز صحة المصادر في التشغيل نفسه.
لا يوجد سجل يومي رسمي مثبت لهذا التاريخ.
قفل الأردن المثبت: أحد الآباء القديسين للمجمع المسكوني الرابع; تصنيف اليوم من التقويم الأردني الرسمي والمرجعان من دورة الأحد الأرثوذكسية المثبتة.
لا يوجد عيد ثابت مثبت لليوم اليولياني 07-13.
لم يُفحص الدليل السنوي في الوضع غير المتصل.
لم تُفحص منصة DCS الرسمية في الوضع غير المتصل.
لا يوجد سجل يومي رسمي مثبت لهذا التاريخ.

body.en:
Exalt the Lord our God, and worship at His footstool, for He is holy.
The Lord reigns; let the peoples tremble.

reference.en: Paul’s First Letter to the Corinthians 11:8-23

body.en:
For man is not from woman, but woman from man;
for man wasn’t created for the woman, but woman for the man.
For this cause the woman ought to have authority over her own head, because of the angels.
Nevertheless, neither is the woman independent of the man, nor the man independent of the woman, in the Lord.
For as woman came from man, so a man also comes through a woman; but all things are from God.
Judge for yourselves. Is it appropriate that a woman pray to God unveiled?
Doesn’t even nature itself teach you that if a man has long hair, it is a dishonor to him?
But if a woman has long hair, it is a glory to her, for her hair is given to her for a covering.
But if any man seems to be contentious, we have no such custom, neither do God’s assemblies.
But in giving you this command I don’t praise you, because you come together not for the better but for the worse.
For first of all, when you come together in the assembly, I hear that divisions exist among you, and I partly believe it.
For there also must be factions among you, that those who are approved may be revealed among you.
When therefore you assemble yourselves together, it is not the Lord’s supper that you eat.
For in your eating each one takes his own supper first. One is hungry, and another is drunken.
What, don’t you have houses to eat and to drink in? Or do you despise God’s assembly and put them to shame who don’t have enough? What shall I tell you? Shall I praise you? In this I don’t praise you.
For I received from the Lord that which also I delivered to you, that the Lord Jesus on the night in which he was betrayed took bread.

reference.en: The Good News According to Matthew 17:10-18

body.en:
His disciples asked him, saying, “Then why do the scribes say that Elijah must come first?”
Jesus answered them, “Elijah indeed comes first, and will restore all things;
but I tell you that Elijah has come already, and they didn’t recognize him, but did to him whatever they wanted to. Even so the Son of Man will also suffer by them.”
Then the disciples understood that he spoke to them of John the Baptizer.
When they came to the multitude, a man came to him, kneeling down to him and saying,
“Lord, have mercy on my son, for he is epileptic and suffers grievously; for he often falls into the fire, and often into the water.
So I brought him to your disciples, and they could not cure him.”
Jesus answered, “Faithless and perverse generation! How long will I be with you? How long will I bear with you? Bring him here to me.”
Jesus rebuked the demon, and it went out of him, and the boy was cured from that hour.

feast.en: Today’s commemoration according to the old church calendar

detail.en: No general fasting season or weekly fast applies today. All listed foods are permitted.

note.en: Conservative automatic baseline; a documented override may apply a local dispensation or a special feast rank.

allowed_summary.en: Permitted: all listed food categories under the general rule

forbidden_summary.en: Not permitted: no category is restricted by a general fast today

duration.en: No general fasting duration applies today.

beginner_explanation.en: The fasting type describes the day’s general food rule; it is not a judgment on a person’s faith or health.

spiritual_note.en: Fasting is also joined to prayer, repentance, mercy, and self-control; it is not only about food.

health_note.en: Health note: do not stop medicine or change treatment because of the app. Children, pregnant people, the ill, older adults, and those doing strenuous work may need an arrangement appropriate to their health.

end_condition.en: The source does not document a separate total-abstinence interval for this day.

detail.en: When a documented total-abstinence fast exists, the app shows its start, end, or ending condition exactly as sourced. Otherwise it does not invent hours.

reference.en: The Good News According to Matthew 5:14-19

body.en:
The Lord shall give strength to His people; the Lord shall bless His people with peace.
Bring to the Lord, O sons of God; bring to the Lord glory and honor.

This saying is faithful, and concerning these things I desire that you insist confidently, so that those who have believed God may be careful to maintain good works. These things are good and profitable to men;
but shun foolish questionings, genealogies, strife, and disputes about the law; for they are unprofitable and vain.
Avoid a factious man after a first and second warning,
knowing that such a one is perverted and sinful, being self-condemned.
When I send Artemas to you, or Tychicus, be diligent to come to me to Nicopolis, for I have determined to winter there.
Send Zenas the lawyer and Apollos on their journey speedily, that nothing may be lacking for them.
Let our people also learn to maintain good works to meet necessary needs, that they may not be unfruitful.
All who are with me greet you. Greet those who love us in faith. Grace be with you all. Amen.

reference.en: The Good News According to Matthew 5:14-19

body.en:
“You are the light of the world. A city located on a hill can’t be hidden.
Neither do you light a lamp and put it under a measuring basket, but on a stand; and it shines to all who are in the house.
Even so, let your light shine before men, that they may see your good works and glorify your Father who is in heaven.
“Don’t think that I came to destroy the law or the prophets. I didn’t come to destroy, but to fulfill.
For most certainly, I tell you, until heaven and earth pass away, not even one smallest letter or one tiny pen stroke shall in any way pass away from the law, until all things are accomplished.
Therefore, whoever shall break one of these least commandments and teach others to do so, shall be called least in the Kingdom of Heaven; but whoever shall do and teach them shall be called great in the Kingdom of Heaven.

summary.en: Verified daily readings and feast texts are composed with the single static Liturgy template.

notice.en: The static Liturgy is stored once. Daily pieces are injected only after source and signature validation.

[البروكيمنن].en:
Psalm 98:5, 1 (LXX)
Exalt the Lord our God, and worship at His footstool, for He is holy.
The Lord reigns; let the peoples tremble.

[فصل من رسالة اليوم].en:
Paul’s First Letter to the Corinthians 11:8-23
For man is not from woman, but woman from man;
for man wasn’t created for the woman, but woman for the man.
For this cause the woman ought to have authority over her own head, because of the angels.
Nevertheless, neither is the woman independent of the man, nor the man independent of the woman, in the Lord.
For as woman came from man, so a man also comes through a woman; but all things are from God.
Judge for yourselves. Is it appropriate that a woman pray to God unveiled?
Doesn’t even nature itself teach you that if a man has long hair, it is a dishonor to him?
But if a woman has long hair, it is a glory to her, for her hair is given to her for a covering.
But if any man seems to be contentious, we have no such custom, neither do God’s assemblies.
But in giving you this command I don’t praise you, because you come together not for the better but for the worse.
For first of all, when you come together in the assembly, I hear that divisions exist among you, and I partly believe it.
For there also must be factions among you, that those who are approved may be revealed among you.
When therefore you assemble yourselves together, it is not the Lord’s supper that you eat.
For in your eating each one takes his own supper first. One is hungry, and another is drunken.
What, don’t you have houses to eat and to drink in? Or do you despise God’s assembly and put them to shame who don’t have enough? What shall I tell you? Shall I praise you? In this I don’t praise you.
For I received from the Lord that which also I delivered to you, that the Lord Jesus on the night in which he was betrayed took bread.

[فصل الإنجيل المعيّن لهذا اليوم].en:
The Good News According to Matthew 17:10-18
His disciples asked him, saying, “Then why do the scribes say that Elijah must come first?”
Jesus answered them, “Elijah indeed comes first, and will restore all things;
but I tell you that Elijah has come already, and they didn’t recognize him, but did to him whatever they wanted to. Even so the Son of Man will also suffer by them.”
Then the disciples understood that he spoke to them of John the Baptizer.
When they came to the multitude, a man came to him, kneeling down to him and saying,
“Lord, have mercy on my son, for he is epileptic and suffers grievously; for he often falls into the fire, and often into the water.
So I brought him to your disciples, and they could not cure him.”
Jesus answered, “Faithless and perverse generation! How long will I be with you? How long will I bear with you? Bring him here to me.”
Jesus rebuked the demon, and it went out of him, and the boy was cured from that hour.

prokeimenon.en:
Psalm 98:5, 1 (LXX)
Exalt the Lord our God, and worship at His footstool, for He is holy.
The Lord reigns; let the peoples tremble.

epistle.en:
Paul’s First Letter to the Corinthians 11:8-23
For man is not from woman, but woman from man;
for man wasn’t created for the woman, but woman for the man.
For this cause the woman ought to have authority over her own head, because of the angels.
Nevertheless, neither is the woman independent of the man, nor the man independent of the woman, in the Lord.
For as woman came from man, so a man also comes through a woman; but all things are from God.
Judge for yourselves. Is it appropriate that a woman pray to God unveiled?
Doesn’t even nature itself teach you that if a man has long hair, it is a dishonor to him?
But if a woman has long hair, it is a glory to her, for her hair is given to her for a covering.
But if any man seems to be contentious, we have no such custom, neither do God’s assemblies.
But in giving you this command I don’t praise you, because you come together not for the better but for the worse.
For first of all, when you come together in the assembly, I hear that divisions exist among you, and I partly believe it.
For there also must be factions among you, that those who are approved may be revealed among you.
When therefore you assemble yourselves together, it is not the Lord’s supper that you eat.
For in your eating each one takes his own supper first. One is hungry, and another is drunken.
What, don’t you have houses to eat and to drink in? Or do you despise God’s assembly and put them to shame who don’t have enough? What shall I tell you? Shall I praise you? In this I don’t praise you.
For I received from the Lord that which also I delivered to you, that the Lord Jesus on the night in which he was betrayed took bread.

The Good News According to Matthew 17:10-18
His disciples asked him, saying, “Then why do the scribes say that Elijah must come first?”
Jesus answered them, “Elijah indeed comes first, and will restore all things;
but I tell you that Elijah has come already, and they didn’t recognize him, but did to him whatever they wanted to. Even so the Son of Man will also suffer by them.”
Then the disciples understood that he spoke to them of John the Baptizer.
When they came to the multitude, a man came to him, kneeling down to him and saying,
“Lord, have mercy on my son, for he is epileptic and suffers grievously; for he often falls into the fire, and often into the water.
So I brought him to your disciples, and they could not cure him.”
Jesus answered, “Faithless and perverse generation! How long will I be with you? How long will I bear with you? Bring him here to me.”
Jesus rebuked the demon, and it went out of him, and the boy was cured from that hour.

[البروكيمنن].en:
Resurrection Tone 7
The Lord shall give strength to His people; the Lord shall bless His people with peace.
Bring to the Lord, O sons of God; bring to the Lord glory and honor.

[فصل من رسالة اليوم].en:
Paul’s Letter to Titus 3:8-15
This saying is faithful, and concerning these things I desire that you insist confidently, so that those who have believed God may be careful to maintain good works. These things are good and profitable to men;
but shun foolish questionings, genealogies, strife, and disputes about the law; for they are unprofitable and vain.
Avoid a factious man after a first and second warning,
knowing that such a one is perverted and sinful, being self-condemned.
When I send Artemas to you, or Tychicus, be diligent to come to me to Nicopolis, for I have determined to winter there.
Send Zenas the lawyer and Apollos on their journey speedily, that nothing may be lacking for them.
Let our people also learn to maintain good works to meet necessary needs, that they may not be unfruitful.
All who are with me greet you. Greet those who love us in faith. Grace be with you all. Amen.

[فصل الإنجيل المعيّن لهذا اليوم].en:
The Good News According to Matthew 5:14-19
“You are the light of the world. A city located on a hill can’t be hidden.
Neither do you light a lamp and put it under a measuring basket, but on a stand; and it shines to all who are in the house.
Even so, let your light shine before men, that they may see your good works and glorify your Father who is in heaven.
“Don’t think that I came to destroy the law or the prophets. I didn’t come to destroy, but to fulfill.
For most certainly, I tell you, until heaven and earth pass away, not even one smallest letter or one tiny pen stroke shall in any way pass away from the law, until all things are accomplished.
Therefore, whoever shall break one of these least commandments and teach others to do so, shall be called least in the Kingdom of Heaven; but whoever shall do and teach them shall be called great in the Kingdom of Heaven.

publication_note.en: Reference preview only; full text is re-verified on its publication date.

feast.en: Today’s commemoration according to the old church calendar

status.en: Wednesday or Friday fast — Strict fast

note.en: Today’s commemoration according to the old church calendar

title.en: Wednesday or Friday fast — Strict fast

detail.en: This is the regular weekly Orthodox fast unless a documented relaxation or local dispensation applies. Avoid meat, dairy, eggs, fish, oil, and wine.

note.en: Conservative automatic baseline; a documented override may apply a local dispensation or a special feast rank.

allowed_summary.en: Permitted: plant foods that do not contain the restricted categories

forbidden_summary.en: Not permitted: Meat and poultry, Dairy, Eggs, Fish, Wine, and Oil

duration.en: This is the food-fasting rule for the displayed church day. The source does not provide separate start and end hours, so the app does not guess a time.

beginner_explanation.en: The fasting type describes the day’s general food rule; it is not a judgment on a person’s faith or health.

spiritual_note.en: Fasting is also joined to prayer, repentance, mercy, and self-control; it is not only about food.

health_note.en: Health note: do not stop medicine or change treatment because of the app. Children, pregnant people, the ill, older adults, and those doing strenuous work may need an arrangement appropriate to their health.

end_condition.en: The source does not document a separate total-abstinence interval for this day.

detail.en: When a documented total-abstinence fast exists, the app shows its start, end, or ending condition exactly as sourced. Otherwise it does not invent hours.

publication_note.en: Reference preview only; full text is re-verified on its publication date.
